title: Khabarovsk、Khabarovsk Krai — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Khabarovsk、Khabarovsk Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Khabarovsk是Khabarovsk Krai的一个城市，人口约610,000。A major Far Eastern city on the Amur River, the administrative center of the Russian Far East with a strategic location near China.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
